runTitle: Local Next.js OAuth smoke - localhost and 127.0.0.1 loopback parity
skippedSurfaces: Supabase auth callback code exchange completion

completedImprovements.title: 127.0.0.1 dev-origin parity for OAuth smoke
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright local smoke + Next dev log verification after normalizing next.config allowedDevOrigins
completedImprovements.note: 127.0.0.1 /login no longer emits blocked cross-origin HMR/WebSocket errors and GitHub OAuth start uses /auth/callback correctly

notes: Dev-server scope only: validated login rendering, OAuth start redirect generation, and HMR/WebSocket stability for localhost and 127.0.0.1.
Out of scope by design: external provider sign-in completion and Supabase callback exchange.
